pages.menu_subtitle: Authentic Japanese flavors crafted with passion and precision
pages.reservations_subtitle: Reserve your spot for an unforgettable dining experience
pages.gallery_subtitle: A visual journey through our culinary artistry
pages.about_subtitle: How a simple love for great food became a neighborhood favorite
pages.contact_subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Visit, call, or send us a message.

about.paragraph1: Every great restaurant starts with one simple belief: food should make people happy. Our kitchen team sources from local farms, hand-selects every ingredient, and builds each dish from scratch — because "good enough" was never good enough for us.
about.paragraph2: Whether it's your first visit or your hundredth, we want you to feel the warmth, the energy, and the care in every single plate that leaves our kitchen.
about.story_title: It Started With One Simple Idea
about.story_p1: Great food doesn't need a complicated story. It just needs someone who cares enough to get it right. That's how this place started — a small kitchen, big ambitions, and a belief that people deserve better than average.
about.story_p2: From day one, we committed to fresh ingredients, generous portions, and a dining experience that makes you want to come back. We source from local suppliers, prepare everything in-house, and treat every guest like a friend.
about.story_p3: Today, we're proud of what we've built — and even more excited about what's next. The best is still ahead.
about.chef_p1: With years of experience across some of the finest kitchens in the country, our head chef brings a blend of classical training and creative instinct to every plate.
about.chef_p2: Their philosophy is simple: "Use the best ingredients, respect them, and let the flavors speak for themselves."
about.chef_p3: When not in the kitchen, our chef is constantly exploring — trying new techniques, visiting local markets, and finding inspiration for the next dish that'll make you go "wow."
about.chef_quote: "Cooking isn't just about feeding people. It's about creating moments they'll remember."
about.values_subtitle: The principles that guide everything we do
about.value_authenticity_text: No shortcuts, no compromises. We follow traditional Japanese methods and recipes that have stood the test of time.
about.value_quality_text: Premium ingredients only. Our fish is sushi-grade, our produce is organic, and our rice is imported from Japan.
about.value_hospitality_text: Omotenashi—Japanese hospitality—is in our DNA. Every guest is treated like family, every visit like a celebration.
about.value_sustainability_text: We source responsibly, minimize waste, and support sustainable fishing practices. Good food, good conscience.
about.cta_subtitle: Book a table and taste the difference that passion makes

featured.title: Customer Favorites
featured.subtitle: Our most-loved dishes that keep people coming back for more
featured.dish1_desc: Our most-ordered dish — fresh ingredients, bold flavors, and a presentation that always gets a reaction. The one our regulars can't live without.
featured.dish2_desc: Changes with the seasons, always delicious. Our chef picks the freshest ingredients of the day and turns them into something memorable.
featured.dish3_desc: Warm, hearty, and deeply satisfying. This is the dish people come back for on cold nights, after long days, or just because it tastes like home.
featured.dish4_desc: The best of what we offer. Sourced from trusted suppliers, prepared with care, and plated for moments that make dinner feel special.

whyUs.title: Why People Choose Us
whyUs.subtitle: What keeps diners coming back, visit after visit
whyUs.feature1_text: Ingredients arrive daily from trusted local suppliers. We never compromise on quality — your food should always be at its best.
whyUs.feature2_text: Our team brings years of professional experience to every dish. Trained, passionate, and dedicated to getting it right every time.
whyUs.feature3_text: We partner with local farms and ethical suppliers. Fresh, sustainable, and traceable — because good food starts with good choices.
whyUs.feature4_text: Pickup, delivery, or dine-in — we make sure your order arrives hot, fresh, and on time. Every single time.

testimonials.title: Word of Mouth
testimonials.subtitle: What regulars and first-timers are saying
testimonials.review1_text: "My husband and I have been coming here for years. The Dragon Roll hasn't changed a bit — that's the magic. You know exactly what you're getting, and it's always perfect. Our kids now order it too."
testimonials.review2_text: "I've reviewed over 200 restaurants for the LA Times, and Your Restaurant Name's omakase is in my top three. Our Head Chef's knife work is meticulous — each piece of nigiri is served at the exact right temperature. This is not a place to sleep on."
testimonials.review3_text: "Ordered catering for my parents' 40th anniversary — 30 people, every single dish was perfect. The salmon sashimi platter alone had everyone asking for the number. Delivery was right on time too. Legend."

cta.title: Ready for an Unforgettable Meal?
cta.subtitle: Book your table now or order online for pickup & delivery

footer.description: Authentic Japanese cuisine crafted with passion. Experience the art of sushi dining at its finest.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Your Restaurant Name. All rights reserved. | Crafted with ❤️ and fresh fish

menu.dragon_roll_desc: Shrimp tempura inside, topped with avocado, eel, and spicy mayo. A customer favorite!
menu.rainbow_roll_desc: California roll base topped with tuna, salmon, yellowtail, avocado, and wasabi mayo.
menu.volcano_roll_desc: Spicy crab mix, cucumber, topped with baked scallops and jalapeño. Bold and delicious!
menu.spider_roll_desc: Crispy soft shell crab, fresh avocado, cucumber, and spicy mayo. A crunchy delight!
menu.philadelphia_roll_desc: Fresh Atlantic salmon, cream cheese, and ripe avocado. Classic and creamy!
menu.tempura_crunch_roll_desc: Tempura shrimp, cream cheese inside, topped with crunchy tempura flakes and eel sauce.
menu.salmon_sashimi_desc: Premium Norwegian salmon, sushi-grade, thinly sliced. Melt-in-your-mouth freshness.
menu.tuna_sashimi_desc: Bluefin tuna, sushi-grade, rich and tender. The connoisseur's choice.
menu.chefs_sashimi_platter_desc: Chef's selection of 15 premium sashimi pieces. Salmon, tuna, yellowtail, and more.
menu.nigiri_set_desc: 8 pieces of chef's choice nigiri with wasabi and pickled ginger. Traditional perfection.
menu.tonkotsu_ramen_desc: Rich pork bone broth, chashu pork, soft-boiled egg, bamboo shoots, handmade noodles.
menu.miso_ramen_desc: Savory miso broth, seasoned ground pork, sweet corn, bean sprouts, butter pat.
menu.spicy_tantanmen_desc: Spicy sesame broth, seasoned ground pork, bok choy, crushed peanuts, chili oil.
menu.vegetable_tempura_bowl_desc: Assorted crispy tempura vegetables over steamed rice with tentsuyu dipping sauce.
menu.garlic_edamame_desc: Steamed young soybeans tossed with garlic salt and sesame oil. Healthy and addictive!
menu.pork_gyoza_desc: Pan-fried pork and vegetable dumplings with ponzu dipping sauce. Crispy outside, juicy inside!
menu.takoyaki_desc: Octopus-filled batter balls with takoyaki sauce, mayo, bonito flakes, and green nori.
menu.miso_soup_desc: Traditional miso broth with silken tofu, wakame seaweed, and green onion. Comforting warmth.
menu.matcha_ice_cream_desc: Creamy Japanese matcha green tea ice cream, 3 generous scoops. Refreshing and authentic.
menu.mochi_assortment_desc: 6 pieces of assorted mochi: strawberry, mango, green tea, black sesame, red bean, vanilla.
menu.tempura_ice_cream_desc: Hot crispy fried batter shell with cold ice cream inside, drizzled with honey. Surprise delight!
menu.japanese_cheesecake_desc: Light, fluffy, jiggly cotton cheesecake. Less sweet, more airy than Western cheesecake.
menu.cta_omakase_subtitle: Let our chef surprise you with a curated tasting experience

contact.success_text: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.parking_text: Free parking available in the rear lot. Street parking on Main Street. 5-minute walk from Downtown Metro Station.

reservations.success_text: We've sent a confirmation email with all the details. See you soon!
reservations.info_intro: We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance. For same-day reservations, please call us directly.
reservations.info_large_parties_text: For groups of 7+, we offer private dining rooms. Please mention in special requests.
reservations.info_omakase_text: Our chef's tasting menu is available Thu-Sat. Limited to 8 guests per seating.
reservations.info_cancellation_text: Please cancel or reschedule at least 4 hours in advance. Late cancellations may incur a fee.
